instructions.instruction: Generate unique 16-character lowercase hexadecimal IDs for every node and edge
instructions.relevant_when: When creating any node or edge in a canvas file

instructions.instruction: Validate that all edge fromNode and toNode values reference IDs that exist in the nodes array
instructions.relevant_when: After creating or editing edges in a canvas file

instructions.instruction: Use string color values (e.g. "1") not integer values (e.g. 1) for the color field
instructions.relevant_when: When setting color on any node or edge

instructions.instruction: Use the JSON escape \n for line breaks in text node content, not literal newlines or \\n
instructions.relevant_when: When writing multi-line text content for text nodes

instructions.instruction: Confirm the resulting file is valid JSON before writing it
instructions.relevant_when: After creating or modifying any canvas file

instructions.instruction: Position nodes with non-overlapping coordinates, leaving 50-100px spacing between nodes
instructions.relevant_when: When placing nodes on the canvas

instructions.instruction: Place child nodes within the x/y/width/height bounds of their parent group node
instructions.relevant_when: When creating group nodes that visually contain other nodes

instructions.instruction: Use only "none" or "arrow" as values for fromEnd and toEnd on edges
instructions.relevant_when: When setting edge endpoint arrow styles
